rulings.Case Title: RAPHAEL MERRIMAN ET AL VS. HING WAH CONSTRUCTION, INC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 24, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF RAPHAEL MERRIMAN, CAROL DONALDSON Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Second Amended Complaint shall be filed and served forthwith. The Court makes no determinations are to the arguments regarding sham pleadings and statute of limitations. If these arguments are raised on a demurrer or a motion for judgment on the pleadings, the parties are ordered to meet and confer in writing and in good faith regarding these issues. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC VS. RICKY OAKLEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Continue Mandatory Settlement Conference And Trial
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 24, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT RICKY OAKLEY Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Continue Mandatory Settlement Conference And Trial Hearing Required. Defendant to present medical evidence regarding the date of the surgery and the recovery time. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER CHIN ET AL VS. PATRICIA GOODWIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 24, 2019 line 4 DEFENDANT PATRICIA GOODWIN DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint is not unintelligible. Defendant may admit or deny allegations in the complaint, as made. Plaintiff's ability to recover possession of the appropriate unit/units will be framed by the allegations of the complaint. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GRACIELA INIGUEZ VS. AGUSTIN CRUZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 24, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT AGUSTIN CRUZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Notice fails to comply with SFRO 37.9B(c)(3). The name of the landlord endeavoring to recover possession is not stated in the Notice. Notice further does not affirmatively stated the current residential address of the landlord. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRENT MARSH VS. MICHAEL CAMPESINO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 24, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT MICHAEL CAMPESINO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Late-filed opposition is stricken. An amended complaint shall only be filed if Plaintiff can make the amendments in good faith and in light of the arguments made in the moving papers. Amended Complaint must allege: (1) the dominant motive; (2) proper service of form 1007; (3) claim for rent/daily damages that do not overlap; (4) demand for $2,700 in monthly rent in light of the rent paid by the master tenant and the Rent Ordinance limitations on rent charged by master tenants; (5) the propriety of proceeding with this action demanding $2,700 in monthly rent prior to the Rent Board's determination of applicability of the Rent Ordinance to this sub-tenancy, i.e. why at this time the rent demanded is not overstated; (6) which of the 15 violations alleged in the Notice to Cure or Quit are curable and how the defendant is to determine which violations are curable and which are not from the face of the Notice. All other deficiencies outlined in the demurrer should also be addressed. Upon the filing of the amended complaint, the parties are encouraged to meet and confer if any further demurrers are to be filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARL ERNST VS. JESSICA SHAEFER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 24, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT JESSICA SHAEFER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint on file. =(501/REQ)
